segments.text: Hi, this is Steve from Northgate Auto. I'm calling with an update on your Subaru Outback.
segments.speaker: local party

segments.text: Oh good, I've been waiting to hear. What did you find?
segments.speaker: remote party

segments.text: So the check engine light was a bad catalytic converter on the passenger side. We also found the CV axle boot is torn on the driver side.
segments.speaker: local party

segments.text: Ugh. How much are we talking?
segments.speaker: remote party

segments.text: The cat is $1,200 for an OEM replacement with labor. The CV axle is $350. Total would be $1,550 plus tax.
segments.speaker: local party

segments.text: Is there an aftermarket option for the cat?
segments.speaker: remote party

segments.text: We can do aftermarket for about $800 installed. It carries a 2-year warranty instead of 5.
segments.speaker: local party

segments.text: Let's go aftermarket on the cat and do the CV axle too.
segments.speaker: remote party

segments.text: Okay, so $800 plus $350, that's $1,150 before tax. We can have it done by Thursday.
segments.speaker: local party

segments.text: You got it. We'll call when it's ready.
segments.speaker: local party

transcription.text: Hi, this is Steve from Northgate Auto. I'm calling with an update on your Subaru Outback. Oh good, I've been waiting to hear. What did you find? So the check engine light was a bad catalytic converter on the passenger side. We also found the CV axle boot is torn on the driver side. Ugh. How much are we talking? The cat is $1,200 for an OEM replacement with labor. The CV axle is $350. Total would be $1,550 plus tax. Is there an aftermarket option for the cat? We can do aftermarket for about $800 installed. It carries a 2-year warranty instead of 5. Let's go aftermarket on the cat and do the CV axle too. Okay, so $800 plus $350, that's $1,150 before tax. We can have it done by Thursday. Thursday works. Thanks Steve. You got it. We'll call when it's ready.
transcription.summary:
## Call Summary

Steve from Northgate Auto called customer about Subaru Outback repairs. Bad catalytic converter (passenger side) and torn CV axle boot (driver side). Customer chose aftermarket cat ($800) plus CV axle ($350) = $1,150 before tax. Ready Thursday.

**Action Items:**
- Complete cat and CV axle repairs by Thursday.
- Call customer when ready.
